title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
summary: Google announces Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a speech-to-speech translation model supporting live dubbing and real-time multilingual translation across 70+ languages with natural-sounding output. The model is available to developers through the Gemini API and integrated into Google Translate on iOS and Android, with a Private Preview option for Google Meet.
writeup: Google for Developers introduces Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a speech-to-speech translation model that handles real-time multilingual translation across more than 70 languages with automatic language detection. The model is accessible through the Gemini API, AI Studio, the Google Translate mobile apps, and a Google Meet preview. The key takeaway is the consolidation of live, voice-to-voice translation into a single model that spans both developer surfaces and consumer products.
